ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the device was seen online */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device type */,
  "default_metrics" TEXT /* Default metrics for this device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit_label" TEXT /* Unit label for the metric */,
  "warn_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold for the metric */,
  "crit_threshold" REAL /* Critical threshold for the metric */,
  "show_in_1st_line" INTEGER /* Whether to show the metric in the 1st line of the report */,
  "report_change_as" TEXT /* How to report changes in the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source method (e.g., SNMP, API) */,
  "collection_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the metric is collected */,
  "last_collected" TEXT /* Last time the metric was collected */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_data" (
  "metric_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric data point */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the data point belongs to */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data point was collected */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the collection time */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data point (e.g., SNMP, API) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Specific data source (e.g., SNMP OID, API endpoint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alert belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_config" (
  "dashboard_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard (e.g., layout, widgets) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the dashboard configuration was modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users who have access to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_config_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the widget was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_config" (
  "widget_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget configuration */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget the configuration belongs to */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget (e.g., data source, appearance) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the widget configuration was modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users who have access to the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_config_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users who have access to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_config" (
  "report_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the report (e.g., layout, data source) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report configuration was modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users who have access to the report configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_config_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., metric, log) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the data source was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
